data.name: Description
data.value: GitHub Actions report generator to emit workflow commands so test runs produce a first-class experience on GitHub Actions.

data.name: AnnotationsOptionDescription
data.value: Enable or disable GitHub Actions failure annotations ('on' or 'off'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.

data.name: AnnotationTitle
data.comment: {0} is the fully qualified test name.

data.name: NoFailureMessageFallback
data.value: The test failed without providing a failure message.

data.name: StepSummaryOptionDescription
data.value: Enable or disable writing a markdown job summary to the GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY file ('on' or 'off'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.

data.name: StepSummaryWriteFailedWarning
data.value: Failed to write the GitHub Actions job summary to '{0}': {1}
data.comment: {0} is the file path, {1} is the error message.

data.name: SlowTestNoticesOptionDescription
data.value: Enable or disable GitHub Actions slow-test notices ('on' or 'off'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.

data.name: SlowTestThresholdOptionDescription
data.value: The number of seconds a test may run before a GitHub Actions slow-test notice is emitted. Defaults to 60.

data.name: SlowTestNoticeTitle
data.comment: {0} is the fully qualified test name.

data.name: SlowTestStillRunning
data.comment: {0} is the fully qualified test name, {1} is the elapsed seconds.

data.name: InvalidSlowTestThreshold
data.value: Invalid value '{0}'. The slow-test threshold must be a positive integer number of seconds.

data.name: GroupTitle
data.comment: {0} is the assembly name, {1} is the target framework moniker.

data.name: GroupsOptionDescription
data.value: Enable or disable per-assembly log groups ('on' or 'off'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.

data.name: InvalidOnOffValue
data.value: Invalid value '{0}'. Valid values are 'on' and 'off'.

data.name: OptionDescription
data.value: Enable GitHub Actions report generator to emit workflow commands so test runs produce a first-class experience on GitHub Actions.
